title: The Cavern Club: The Beat Goes On
original_title: The Cavern Club: The Beat Goes On
overview: Presented by Paul McGann, The Cavern Club and LA Factual have come together to produce "The Cavern Club: The Beat Goes On" - a unique documentary feature, telling the untold, complete and colourful story of the 'greatest club in the world'.
